candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears as a component of the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' because the statement also shows 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value' and the values sum to the total COGS. Adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the total row 'Cost of goods sold'. The explicit COGS D&A line is embedded within that total, as indicated by the balancing-value structure.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation of intangible assets arising from acquisitions
candidates.why: Potential SG&A-related D&A candidate, but it appears to be a component of the selected parent row 'Selling expenses' because the statement also shows 'Selling expenses - Balancing value' and the values sum to total selling expenses. Do not add separately.

This is an administrative D&A component, but it is embedded in the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses' as shown by 'Administrative expenses - Balancing value' summing to the total. Adding separately would double count.

This is an R&D D&A component, but it is embedded in the selected parent row 'Development costs' as shown by 'Research and development expenses - Balancing value' summing to the total. Also, 'Development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding this separately would distort the intended XSGA minus XRD logic.

variables.notes: All visible SG&A/R&D-related D&A rows are nested components of already selected parent rows ('Selling expenses', 'Administrative expenses', 'Development costs'). No separate same-level SG&A D&A row should be added.
